step_rationale: Discriminates plaque erosion (endothelial-driven) phenotype in STEMI.
mechanism: miR-3667-3p differentially marks the endothelial erosion phenotype in Type 1 MI, distinguishing erosion-mediated acute coronary thrombosis from plaque rupture.

references.title: High Levels of Circulating MicroRNA-3667-3p Are Associated with Coronary Plaque Erosion in Patients with ST-Segment Elevation Myocardial Infarction.
